title: Document Approval Workflow System
description: Track document approvals for contracts, purchases, and offers, while AI analyzes SLA pressure, financial risk, and signing bottlenecks.
description_cn: 文档审批工作流跟踪合同、采购和 Offer 的 SLA，AI 分析风险金额与签署瓶颈。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Document Approval Workflow System: an approval board, a document registration form, SLA risk, and an AI approval analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/35-document-approval.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 文档审批工作流：审批看板、文档登记表、SLA 风险和 AI 审批分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/35-document-approval.html
